demo.title: odyssey-robin-staking.sh
demo.code:
# Casual prompts work once the skill is installed
bankr agent prompt "hey, can you check my staking balance on the robin staking pool?"

bankr agent prompt "stake 1000 robin for me"

bankr agent prompt "claim my eth rewards from robin staking"

setup: Requires Bankr API key with Wallet API + write access; wallet must hold $ROBIN and ETH on RH4663
